title: erigeron acris var. khasianus
intro: Erigeron acris var. khasianus, commonly known as the Himalayan Fleabane, is a variant of the Erigeron acris plant species that belongs to the daisy family. This perennial herb is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Erigeron acris var. khasianus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe digestive problems. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used in traditional medicine practices to harness its medicinal properties.
